productDisplayName: Nike Women Flex 2012 RN Black Sports Shoes
description: A running shoe that's in touch with your foot, the nike Flex 2012 has 76 sensors to deliver multi-directional flexibility and optimal foot feel on the outsole. The flexibility of the shoes can really be noticed when standing on ones toes, so these shoes are great for both sprinting (on the toes), or easy distance (mid-foot or heel). A runner who puts in a lot of miles each week will appreciate this shoe because it's lightweight and comfortable. On the other hand, a moderate runner will appreciate this shoe because they're not footing extra weight as is the case with some of the heavier running shoes.UpperMesh upper with soft felt overlaysSoft, mesh liningLacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue and collar for snug fitPadded foot-bed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for a cushioned rideOutsoleOne piece rubber outsole with deep grooves and waffle patterned lugsOut-sole adhered onto the upper to act as a guardShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
